title: LLM 主观评审系统
subtitle: LLM Subjective Review System
description: 基于 LLM 的盲审流水线，分批评估代码设计质量并合并多轮评审结果
sub_problems: Review packet generation with file context
Batch splitting and parallel subagent execution
best_practices: Fail-closed import validation prevents low-quality reviews
Blind review isolation prevents score-aware bias
